session.user:
Run the following command and report results: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py
Report full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py
Run ruff check on dispatch command and test files

session.assistant:
**Result: ruff check passed**
All checks passed! The files: - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py` - `tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py`
contain no linting violations according to ruff.
